_comment_top: Realtime DB security rules — locks down /elevate-eo-campus-unite-2026/* so only allowlisted admin Google accounts can read all registrations + tickets + raffle. Public users can claim an empty ticket slot but cannot enumerate other registrations.
_comment_deploy: Apply via: firebase deploy --only database --project test-database-55379 (after pointing firebase.json's 'database.rules' at this file). Test sibling apps (autoclicker, aircon, weddingbar, tayo, monthsary, echoes, devo-sync*, etc.) afterwards — they currently rely on default-open rules.

elevate-eo-campus-unite-2026._comment: Overrides the open default. Children below grant only the access each role needs.

tickets..read: auth != null && auth.token.email_verified == true && (auth.token.email == 'charliecayno@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'maui.victorio@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'christian.ilao@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'kobe.serrano@cm.ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'jharmaine4@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'angelica.macalalad@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'anggemacalalad@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'serranokobe1@gmail.com')
tickets..write: auth != null && auth.token.email_verified == true && (auth.token.email == 'charliecayno@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'maui.victorio@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'christian.ilao@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'kobe.serrano@cm.ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'jharmaine4@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'angelica.macalalad@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'anggemacalalad@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'serranokobe1@gmail.com')

$ticketId._comment: Public flow: single ticket read (any signed-in user, incl. anonymous) so register.html can check ticket existence + registered status; write to mark a previously-empty ticket as registered.
$ticketId..write: auth != null && (data.exists() && data.child('registered').val() != true && newData.child('registered').val() == true)

registrations..read: auth != null && auth.token.email_verified == true && (auth.token.email == 'charliecayno@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'maui.victorio@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'christian.ilao@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'kobe.serrano@cm.ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'jharmaine4@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'angelica.macalalad@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'anggemacalalad@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'serranokobe1@gmail.com')
registrations..write: auth != null && auth.token.email_verified == true && (auth.token.email == 'charliecayno@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'maui.victorio@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'christian.ilao@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'kobe.serrano@cm.ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'jharmaine4@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'angelica.macalalad@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'anggemacalalad@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'serranokobe1@gmail.com')

$ticketId._comment: Public flow: a registrant can read their own registration (e.g. the 'already registered' state) and write a new one when the slot is empty + the ticket exists.

raffle..read: auth != null && auth.token.email_verified == true && (auth.token.email == 'charliecayno@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'maui.victorio@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'christian.ilao@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'kobe.serrano@cm.ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'jharmaine4@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'angelica.macalalad@ccf.org.ph' || auth.token.email == 'anggemacalalad@gmail.com' || auth.token.email == 'serranokobe1@gmail.com')
